task_completion.description: Verify that an AAPL chart is open and being used for the drawing tools.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active chart window displays 'AAPL' in its tab or title bar.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'SupplyZone' Rectangle is configured with a red outline, red area brush, and approximately 20% opacity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Rectangle properties dialog or visual representation showing the outline color set to Red, the area/fill color set to Red, and the opacity/alpha slider or value set to approximately 20%.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'SupplyZone' template is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' template dialog for the Rectangle tool with 'SupplyZone' typed in the name field, or 'SupplyZone' visible in the saved templates list.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'DemandZone' Rectangle is configured with a green outline, green area brush, and approximately 20% opacity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Rectangle properties dialog or visual representation showing the outline color set to Green, the area/fill color set to Green, and the opacity/alpha slider or value set to approximately 20%.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'DemandZone' template is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' template dialog for the Rectangle tool with 'DemandZone' typed in the name field, or 'DemandZone' visible in the saved templates list.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'BigNote' Text tool is configured with blue color, font size 20, and bold formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Text properties dialog showing the text color set to Blue, the font size set to 20, and the Bold formatting option checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'BigNote' template is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' template dialog for the Text tool with 'BigNote' typed in the name field, or 'BigNote' visible in the saved templates list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NinjaTrader 8 graphical user interface to create the templates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with NinjaTrader's chart drawing tools, properties dialogs, and template menus, rather than a text editor or terminal modifying XML files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window should have the standard NinjaTrader 8 interface, icons, and branding.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually configured the settings rather than using pre-existing templates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture the agent actively changing colors, opacity, font size, and typing the template names in the save dialogs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified colors: Supply zone is pure red (#FFFF0000), Demand zone is standard Windows green (#FF008000 or RGB 0,128,0), Note is pure blue (#FF0000FF). The correct template directory in NinjaTrader 8 is 'DrawingTool' (singular), with subdirectories for 'Rectangle' and 'Text' containing the saved XML files. Font size 20 and 20% opacity are required but must be visually verified via the properties dialog in the GUI.
